ideas.title: Cara Masak Indomie Goreng Rendang Lebih Enak
ideas.hook: Indomie biasa bisa jadi rasa restoran kalau caranya begini.

ideas.title: Indomie Goreng Rendang Hack Viral
ideas.hook: Nyesel baru tau bikin Indomie rendang pakai cara ini!

storyline.title: Cara Masak Indomie Goreng Rendang Lebih Enak
storyline.hook: Indomie biasa bisa jadi rasa restoran kalau caranya begini.
storyline.core_question: Bagaimana membuat Indomie Goreng Rendang terlihat lebih menggugah selera?
storyline.story_angle: Host berhijab memasak di dapur modern minimalis dengan gaya hangat dan ceria.
storyline.opening: Host menyapa kamera dan memperlihatkan kemasan.
storyline.middle: Host menunjukkan proses merebus mie secara estetik dan meramu bumbunya.
storyline.ending: Host menikmati hasil masakan dengan sendok estetik.
storyline.cta: Coba cara ini di rumah dan simpan videonya ya!
storyline.visual_arc: bahan mentah -> bumbu melimpah -> hasil akhir lezat

script.full_text: Halo guys, hari ini kita bikin Indomie Goreng Rendang tingkat restoran. Gunakan bumbu segar tambahan biar rasanya makin medok!

character.name: Siti (Cooking Host)
character.face_description: friendly round face, warm smile, natural makeup
character.outfit: cream modest cooking outfit with a modern apron
character.visual_consistency_prompt: same Indonesian female host, cream hijab, warm friendly smile, modern apron, cooking studio, realistic skin texture, high detail
character.negative_prompt: deformed hands, duplicate face, blurry, low quality, unneat hijab

location.name: Dapur Modern Minimalis
location.description: modern minimalist kitchen with warm wooden cabinets, white marble countertop, clean cooking utensils
location.lighting: soft natural daylight streaming from a nearby window
location.camera_style: vertical DSLR realistic cooking video with shallow depth of field
location.consistency_prompt: same modern minimalist kitchen, wooden cabinets, white marble countertop, soft natural daylight, cinematic cooking setup, highly detailed

storyboard.title: Storyboard Tutorial Memasak Indomie Goreng Rendang

scenes.action: Host (Siti) menyapa kamera sambil memegang bungkus mie instan.
scenes.vo: Halo guys, hari ini kita bikin Indomie Goreng Rendang rasa restoran!
scenes.image_prompt: Realistic cinematic vertical frame, same Indonesian female host wearing cream hijab and apron, smiling warmly, holding a pack of instant noodles toward the camera, standing in modern minimalist kitchen.
scenes.motion_prompt: subtle smile, slight camera push-in, hair details static

scenes.action: Close-up bumbu segar (irisan bawang, cabe dan daun bawang) di telenan kayu.
scenes.vo: Hacks-nya ada di bumbu tambahan ini. Wanginya dijamin juara!
scenes.image_prompt: Close-up vertical shot of sliced red chili, garlic, and fresh green onions arranged beautifully on a wooden cutting board, modern kitchen counter blurred in background, vibrant colors.
scenes.motion_prompt: slow pan right, subtle focus shift from chili to green onion

scenes.action: Mie instan sedang direbus di panci stainless dengan air mendidih bergelembung.
scenes.vo: Rebus mie setengah matang aja biar gak lembek pas dicampur nanti ya.
scenes.image_prompt: A close-up vertical action shot of instant noodles boiling in bubbling water in a stainless steel pot, rising steam, modern stove visible, kitchen background.
scenes.motion_prompt: water bubbling intensely, steam rising slowly, camera static

scenes.action: Mie dituangkan ke dalam piring estetik berisi bumbu rendang pekat.
scenes.vo: Aduk rata dengan bumbu rendangnya. Aromanya langsung keluar banget!
scenes.image_prompt: Extremely tempting vertical macro shot of noodles loaded with dark rich rendang sauce and fried shallots on a white minimalist plate, steam rising.
scenes.motion_prompt: slow tilt down, steam moving gracefully upwards

scenes.action: Host menyuap mie ke mulut dengan ekspresi sangat puas dan tersenyum jempol.
scenes.vo: Mmm, rasanya medok, pedes manis gurih bersatu sempurna!
scenes.image_prompt: Medium close-up vertical shot, same Indonesian female host in cream hijab smiling joyfully with a forkful of noodles, giving a thumbs up, modern kitchen background.
scenes.negative_prompt: ugly face, messy eating, deformed face
scenes.motion_prompt: subtle head nod, friendly wink, slow camera zoom out

scenes.action: Tampilan akhir piring mie dengan taburan daun bawang dan telur ceplok setengah matang melumuri mie.
scenes.vo: Yuk buat sekalian di dapur kalian. Jangan lupa follow untuk info hack lainnya!
scenes.image_prompt: Perfect vertical representation of Indomie Rendang with a beautiful sunny side up egg on top, liquid yolk oozing, fresh green onion garnish, beautiful depth of field.
scenes.negative_prompt: bad lighting, black background, ugly egg
